name: eia-mcp-server
description: Browse and query the U.S. Energy Information Administration API v2 — electricity, petroleum, natural gas, coal, forecasts, and more via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

eia_api_key.title: EIA API Key
eia_api_key.description: Free API key from api.eia.gov. Required — all requests use this as the api_key query parameter. Register at https://www.eia.gov/opendata/register.php.
